allowed_claims: R10 L1 ingested and profiled the official HPS/HTOPS March 2026 PUF CSV.
The artifact can provide guarded survey outcome proxy inputs for R10 routes.
blocked_claims: R10 supports Product core method by default
HPS survey proxy equals customer field outcome
claim_boundary: R10 HPS policy reaction ingestion artifact. It proves a source-backed public-use microdata slice was read and profiled for guarded method development only; it is not field validation, not method superiority, and not runtime default authorization.

interpretation.PRICECHANGE: reported price change exposure or perception

outcome_label_contract.risk_proxy_rule: larger numeric response codes are treated as higher guarded price-pressure proxy
